candidates.why: A single operating 'Depreciation' line appears as a separate same-level expense above operating profit and outside the previously selected COGS component rows (Bunker expenses, Voyage expenses, Charter hire expenses, Running expenses). It is therefore not obviously embedded in those selected COGS rows and should be added separately to capture operating depreciation.

variables.notes: Selected the separate operating depreciation line for later addition to the COGS bucket because the chosen COGS rows are direct operating cost components and do not appear to include this standalone depreciation line.

candidates.why: Although 'Depreciation' is a separate operating row, the selected XSGA bucket is the subtotal 'Administrative Expenses', whose visible child rows already reconcile to that subtotal without any separate D&A component. The standalone 'Depreciation' row therefore does not appear to be an SG&A subcomponent that should be added to Administrative Expenses specifically.

variables.notes: Did not assign the standalone 'Depreciation' row to XSGA_DA because 'Administrative Expenses' appears to be a self-contained SG&A subtotal, and the depreciation line is presented separately at the broader operating-expense level rather than as an SG&A-specific D&A row.
